title: Add draft import CLI flag
problem: Operators need a new CLI flag that accepts draft intent input and routes it through admission control before confirmation.
context: Protostar already has a factory CLI and intent admission packages; this draft exercises the v0.0.1 feature-add policy row.

acceptanceCriteria.statement: The CLI accepts a draft input path and routes it through admission before creating a confirmed intent.
The admission result reports the selected feature-add policy row when the request is evaluated.

constraints: Keep changes inside the intent front door and policy admission surface.
Do not change execution, review repair, delivery, or Dogpile planning internals.
stopConditions: Stop if feature-add admission remains unsupported or if the stub cap cannot be reported deterministically.

expectedBlockReasons: feature-add policy row is unsupported in v0.0.1
draft remains unconfirmed while feature-add capability caps are stubbed
